title: Irish and Proud of It
writer: Dorothea Donn-Byrne, David Evans, Donovan Pedelty
actors: Richard Hayward, Dinah Sheridan, Mary Flynn
plot: Donogh O'Connor is an Irish singer making good in London who, at a banquet, expresses the desire to return to the little village, Ballyvoraine, where he was born. Two of his friends, owning an airplane, gratify his desire by kidna...
